---
title: "Samane Afshar"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: images/profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/YOUR-USERNAME
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:s.afshar2006@gmail.com
    - text: CV
      href: cv/Samane.pdf
---
Ph.D. student in Planning and Public Affairs at the University of Oregon. My research focuses on urban climate governance, sustainability, and energy transistion. 

## Education

**University of Oregon**  
Ph.D. in Planning and Public Affairs  

**University of Tehran**  
MA in European Studies 

## Research Interests

Urban climate governance  
Localization of Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs)  
Energy Transition   

## Experience 

Graduate Teaching Fellow, University of Oregon

Policy Researcher


<div style="height:100px;"></div>
---
